HGSS.357.0000:
Hmm? You are here for my grandson?
His name is Bill.\f
He’s in Johto.
He does something with PCs,\r
so I’m house-sitting.\f
HGSS.357.0001:
Ah, my grandson mentioned a round,
blue Pokémon that has leaves\r
growing on its head.\f
HGSS.357.0002:
Bill told me about a Pokémon that is
very loyal to its Trainer.\r
It’s a Fire-type Pokémon that’s\r
supposed to Roar well.\f
HGSS.357.0003:
Do you know that Pokémon with large,
round eyes.\f
The one that sings a lullaby with
its cute voice!\f
HGSS.357.0004:
Do you know that hugely popular
Pokémon?\f
The Pokémon that has a yellow body
and bright red cheeks...\f
I would love to see what it looks
like before it evolves.\f
HGSS.357.0005:
I heard that there is a blue and round
Pokémon in Johto.\f
Bill told me that the end of its tail
works like a float.\f
Its belly is white. Just the belly.
I would love to see what it looks like.\f
HGSS.357.0006:
My grandson Bill told me about a
Pokémon that has a long tongue.\f
It has ringlike marks on the front
of its legs, he said!\f
HGSS.357.0007:
Ah, my grandson mentioned a round,
blue Pokémon that has leaves\r
growing on its head.\f
HGSS.357.0008:
Do you know of a sea Pokémon that
has a red sphere in its body?\r
You know, the one that’s shaped like\r
a star?\f
I heard that it appears at night.
I would surely like to see it.\f
HGSS.357.0009:
I heard about a cute Pokémon that
has six tails.\f
I would love to hug a cute Pokémon
like that.\f
HGSS.357.0010:
Do you know that hugely popular
Pokémon?\f
The Pokémon that has a yellow body
and bright red cheeks...\f
I would love to see what it looks
like before it evolves.\f
HGSS.357.0011:
If you have that Pokémon,
may I see it, please? [0200,0000]
HGSS.357.0012:
You will show me?
How good of you!\f
HGSS.357.0013:
You don’t have it?
That’s too bad...
HGSS.357.0014:
Hm?\f
That’s not the Pokémon that I was
told about...
HGSS.357.0015:
Wow!
That Pokémon is called [0100,0000,0000]!\f
It’s a wonderful Pokémon!
As a token of my appreciation,\r
I would like to give this to you!\f
HGSS.357.0017:
Thanks for showing me so many
cute Pokémon.\r
I really enjoyed myself.\f
I’m glad I’ve lived such a long life.
HGSS.357.0018:
There is a dusty machine under
the cloth cover...\r
It has not been used for some time.
